reviews.review_description: I've played Animal Company for a year and a half and I never expect them to make a new game, this new game is fantastic and I love it I really hope they can keep updating Animal Company and also this game at the same time they're both really great games but I'm also proud of the developers for making a new game something new something different and I can't wait to see what's next for this game I'm proud of you guys
I’m glad that your studio is actually focusing on making more games than just Animal Company! Wooster is finally getting to its peak, let’s go!
